Fusion.name: 融合 Fusion
Fusion.description:
整体大于部分之和。世上没有任何存在比名为“融合体”的不寻常族裔更能证明这句格言。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-journals.JournalEntry.x9cQ10AvrayM6wRT.JournalEntryPage.UQoAhRp35Tgpzib4]{融合体族裔}

The whole is greater than the sum of its parts. No existence in the world proves this saying more than the unusual ancestry known as the fusion.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-journals.JournalEntry.x9cQ10AvrayM6wRT.JournalEntryPage.UQoAhRp35Tgpzib4]{Fusion Ancestry}

Lamia.name: 拉弥亚 Lamia
Lamia.description:
一道古老的诅咒，一种古老的渴望，以及一份古老的怨恨。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-journals.JournalEntry.x9cQ10AvrayM6wRT.JournalEntryPage.AXUBsBPF1b3Llock]{拉米亚族裔}

An ancient curse, an ancient thirst, and an ancient grudge.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-journals.JournalEntry.x9cQ10AvrayM6wRT.JournalEntryPage.AXUBsBPF1b3Llock]{Lamia Ancestry}

Werecreature.name: 兽化人 Werecreature
Werecreature.description:
兽化人的自然外貌是类人生物与某种特定（通常为食肉的）动物之间的混合形态。兽化人可以随意在该形态、完全类人形态以及完全兽形之间切换，不过许多兽化人更倾向于保持类人形态，以便在其他族裔之中不被察觉地行动。然而，当满月升至头顶时，一些兽化人会被迫变形为其混合形态，并进行嗜血的狂暴行为。这种行为使得其他族裔对兽化人感到恐惧与不信任。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-journals.JournalEntry.x9cQ10AvrayM6wRT.JournalEntryPage.i1XyxZO5hGufMau0]{兽化人族裔}

A werecreature’s natural appearance is that of a hybrid between a humanoid and a specific, usually carnivorous, animal. Werecreatures can shift between that form, a fully humanoid form, and an entirely bestial form at will, though many prefer to remain in their humanoid shape to move undetected among other ancestries. However, when a full moon rises overhead, some werecreatures are compelled to transform into their hybrid forms and carry out bloodthirsty rampages. This behavior had led to other ancestries fearing and mistrusting werecreatures.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-journals.JournalEntry.x9cQ10AvrayM6wRT.JournalEntryPage.i1XyxZO5hGufMau0]{Werecreature Ancestry}

Cerebrophage.name: 噬脑者 Cerebrophage
Cerebrophage.description:
脑鹦鹉螺是一种微小而聪慧的异怪，拥有恶毒的生态：通常，当脑鹦鹉螺附着在一名生物的身体上时，该生物注定会痛苦地死去，因为脑鹦鹉螺会吞噬该生物的大脑，并操控其尸体去猎杀猎物。但在极少数情况下，脑鹦鹉螺会对一名有感知生物的大脑产生反应，使二者融合为一种完全不同的单一生物，拥有全新的身份与族裔，并仅保留原本两种生命形态的记忆、情感与洞见的些许碎片与闪回。这些神秘的新存在仍会渴求大脑，因此得名“脑噬者”（cerebrophage），亦即“食脑者”。

A brain nautilus is a tiny intelligent aberration with a malevolent ecology: usually, when a brain nautilus attaches to a creature's body, the creature is doomed to a painful death as the brain nautilus devours the creature's brain and puppeteers their corpse to hunt down prey. But on rare occasions, the brain nautilus reacts to a sapient creature's brain, causing the two to blend together into an entirely different single creature with a brand new identity and ancestry and only fragments and flashes of the memories, feelings, and insights of the original two life forms. These enigmatic new beings continue to hunger for brains, and so they gained the name "cerebrophage," or "eater of brains."

Devil.name: 魔鬼 Devil
Devil.description:
无契约魔鬼是异界的恶魔，它们通过狡诈、诡计，以及偷窃并毁灭自身的炼狱契约，从地狱的僵硬等级制度中解放出来。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-journals.JournalEntry.x9cQ10AvrayM6wRT.JournalEntryPage.vvgmtTgKCeSZPTHr]{魔鬼族裔}

Contractless devils are otherworldly fiends who freed themselves from Hell's rigid hierarchy through cunning, guile, and the theft and destruction of their own infernal contract.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-journals.JournalEntry.x9cQ10AvrayM6wRT.JournalEntryPage.vvgmtTgKCeSZPTHr]{Devil Ancestry}

Giant.name: 巨人 Giant
Giant.description:
巨人是体型庞大的人形生物，随着他们的成就累积而增长身高与力量。他们一个壮举接一个壮举地将自己的名字刻入历史，成为强大的活传奇

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-journals.JournalEntry.x9cQ10AvrayM6wRT.JournalEntryPage.8VJPt4fV7ZgYObLW]{巨人族裔}

Giants are large humanoids who grow in stature and strength as their accomplishments mount. Deed by deed, they carve their name into history, becoming powerful living legends

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-journals.JournalEntry.x9cQ10AvrayM6wRT.JournalEntryPage.8VJPt4fV7ZgYObLW]{Giant Ancestry}

Psychopomp.name: 灵魂引渡者 Psychopomp
Psychopomp.description:
外表不祥、神情严厉，灵魂引渡者是新近亡者的守护者与向导，致力于维系灵魂的循环与死亡的神圣。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-journals.JournalEntry.x9cQ10AvrayM6wRT.JournalEntryPage.tKZvs2jtKOiXm1a7]{灵魂引渡者族裔}

Ominous in appearance and stern in countenance, psychopomps are guardians and guides for the recently deceased, who strive to maintain the cycle of souls and the sanctity of death.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-journals.JournalEntry.x9cQ10AvrayM6wRT.JournalEntryPage.tKZvs2jtKOiXm1a7]{Psychopomp Ancestry}

Sphinx.name: 斯芬克斯 Sphinx
Sphinx.description:
生命是一则谜语——而斯芬克斯意图解开它。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-journals.JournalEntry.x9cQ10AvrayM6wRT.JournalEntryPage.LFRoC5KZTrLa8uvf]{斯芬克斯族裔}

Life is a riddle—and sphinxes intend to solve it.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-journals.JournalEntry.x9cQ10AvrayM6wRT.JournalEntryPage.LFRoC5KZTrLa8uvf]{Sphinx Ancestry}

Angel.name: 天使 Angel
Angel.description:
不够好而进不了天堂，不够邪恶而下不了地狱，所以你在这里。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-journals.JournalEntry.x9cQ10AvrayM6wRT.JournalEntryPage.ITImTyYjZ91IQtQx]{天使族裔}

Not good enough for Heaven, not wicked enough for Hell, here you are instead.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-journals.JournalEntry.x9cQ10AvrayM6wRT.JournalEntryPage.ITImTyYjZ91IQtQx]{Angel Ancestry}

Swarmblood.name: 群血 Swarmblood
Swarmblood.description:
皮肤下有东西在脉动般移动的那种诡异感觉，知道自己睡着时任何东西都可能在颅骨内蠕动的认知，害怕寄生虫把你的身体当作巢穴、为自己窃取你的生命力。群血者是令人艳羡不起来的少数——这些类人生物的身体不只属于他们自己；他们与一个由千个独立心智构成的侵染共享着自己的皮肤。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-journals.JournalEntry.x9cQ10AvrayM6wRT.JournalEntryPage.UrQeUrqNVKrf0Ckg]{群血者族裔}

The uncanny feeling of movement pulsing beneath your skin, the knowledge that anything could wriggle inside your skull while you sleep, the fear of a parasite making your body its home, stealing your vitality for itself. Swarmbloods are an unenvied few, humanoids whose bodies belong not only to themselves but who share their skins with an infestation with a thousand minds of their own.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-journals.JournalEntry.x9cQ10AvrayM6wRT.JournalEntryPage.UrQeUrqNVKrf0Ckg]{Swarmblood Ancestry}

Evil Eye.name: 邪眼 Evil Eye
Evil Eye.description:
神秘且特立独行的生物，邪眼以其不同寻常的外表、巨大的眼睛、诡异的诅咒、眼部射线与其他能力而闻名。许多邪眼追寻属于自己的个人道路来理解周遭的世界，几乎不在意其先祖的意见与压力。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-journals.JournalEntry.x9cQ10AvrayM6wRT.JournalEntryPage.2eBLCvc2ZBtXyQn0]{邪眼族裔}

Mysterious and individualistic creatures, evil eyes are known for their unusual appearance, their huge eye, strange curses, eye beams, and other powers. Many evil eyes seek their own personal path to understand the world around them, with little regard to the opinions and pressures of their forebears.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-journals.JournalEntry.x9cQ10AvrayM6wRT.JournalEntryPage.2eBLCvc2ZBtXyQn0]{Evil Eye Ancestry}

Golemborn.name: 魔像裔 Golemborn
Golemborn.description:
有时，当一位技艺精湛的魔法工匠制造一个无心智的魔像时，它的躯壳会吸引灵魂能量，并与魔像的驱动之灵融合，成为一种完全活着的存在，被称为“魔像裔”。另外，魔像裔也可能起源于某个病弱或濒死之人的心智被移植进一个通常无生命的构装体之中，从而形成有生命与无生命的融合体。魔像裔乍看之下可能会被误认为普通魔像，尤其是在观察他们身体中无生命的部分时更是如此；然而，当该魔像裔展现出简单构装体所不具备的情感与理性思考时，这些误解很快就会烟消云散。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-journals.JournalEntry.x9cQ10AvrayM6wRT.JournalEntryPage.C1OBYIwF3wFl9gqX]{魔像裔族裔}

Sometimes, when a skilled magical crafter constructs a mindless golem, its frame attracts soul energy and merges with the golem’s animating spirit to become a fully living being known as a golemborn. Alternatively, a golemborn might originate when a sick or dying person’s mind is grafted into a usually unliving construct, forming a fusion of animate and inanimate. A golemborn might be mistaken for a regular golem at first glance, especially when looking at the inanimate portions of their body, though those assumptions are quickly dispelled when that golemborn exhibits emotions and rational thought unknown to a simple construct.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-journals.JournalEntry.x9cQ10AvrayM6wRT.JournalEntryPage.C1OBYIwF3wFl9gqX]{Golemborn Ancestry}

Arboreal.name: 树栖 Arboreal
Arboreal.description:
树栖族是长寿的有感知树人，通常在古老森林深处过着缓慢的生活。当树栖族离开他们的森林家园——无论是出于选择、必要，还是绝望——他们会发现外面的世界以不同的节奏运转。森林之外的世界带来的全新体验——既有奇观也有恐怖——正等待着他们。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-journals.JournalEntry.x9cQ10AvrayM6wRT.JournalEntryPage.LMzqWRackXK06Q1s]{树栖族族裔}

Arboreals are long-lived sapient tree people who usually live a slow life deep within ancient woods. When an arboreal leaves their forest home, either by choice, necessity, or desperation, they discover that the outside world moves at a different pace. The new experiences—both wonders and horrors alike—of the world beyond the forest await.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-journals.JournalEntry.x9cQ10AvrayM6wRT.JournalEntryPage.LMzqWRackXK06Q1s]{Arboreal Ancestry}

Gargoyle.name: 石像鬼 Gargoyle
Gargoyle.description:
受荣誉、责任与亲族关系所束缚，石像鬼是夜行的守护者，守望着他们珍视之物，并利用他们骇人的名声向敌人灌输恐惧。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-journals.JournalEntry.x9cQ10AvrayM6wRT.JournalEntryPage.733sh1qkTAoKhoZO]{石像鬼族裔}

Bound by honor, duty, and kinship, gargoyles are nocturnal guardians who maintain vigil over that which they hold dear and leverage their terrifying reputation to strike fear into their enemies.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-journals.JournalEntry.x9cQ10AvrayM6wRT.JournalEntryPage.733sh1qkTAoKhoZO]{Gargoyle Ancestry}
